summary: Matched several previously placeholder functions in src/melee/it/items/itmball.c and added the missing MBall item-specific variable struct plumbing. The PR introduced itMBall_ItemVars with a single u8 x0 field in itCommonItems.h, added it to the Item.xDD4_itemVar union as mball, and updated itmball.c to use xDD4_itemVar.mball.x0 instead of reusing another item's union member. The matched functions include simple item lifecycle/collision handlers such as it_802978DC, it_80297944, it_802980D4, and it_80298114.
what_changed: Replaced placeholders in itmball.c for it_802978DC, it_80297944, it_802980D4, and it_80298114 with C implementations.
Added required includes to itmball.c, including it/inlines.h, it/it_2725.h, it/itCommonItems.h, it/types.h, dolphin/mtx.h, melee/gr/ground.h, melee/it/item.h, and melee/lb/lb_00B0.h.
Implemented it_802978DC to fetch the Item via GET_ITEM and decrement Item_804A0C64.x1C when bit 6 of it->xDD4_itemVar.mball.x0 is not set.
Implemented it_80297944 to fetch the item and JObj, call it_8026B390, zero x40_vel.x/y/z, and call Item_80268E5C with ITEM_ANIM_UPDATE.
Implemented it_802980D4 as a victim-collision bounce path using it_8026B3A8, it_802725D4, itColl_BounceOffVictim, and returning 0.
Implemented it_80298114 as a shield-collision bounce path using it_8026B3A8 and returning itColl_BounceOffShield.
Added typedef struct itMBall_ItemVars with field u8 x0 to itCommonItems.h.
Added itMBall_ItemVars mball to the Item.xDD4_itemVar union in types.h.
smart_moves: Kept the item-specific state in the existing xDD4_itemVar union model instead of aliasing another item's struct.
Used a minimal itMBall_ItemVars definition matching the observed access pattern: one byte at offset x0.
Preserved anonymous function names where no semantic name was introduced, avoiding unsupported renames.
Used existing item helper macros and routines such as GET_ITEM, GET_JOBJ, Item_80268E5C, it_8026B3A8, and item collision bounce helpers rather than open-coding equivalent behavior.
decomp_lessons: When a function accesses xDD4_itemVar for a specific item, add a dedicated item-specific struct and union member rather than borrowing a similar-looking member from another item.
Even if two item var layouts appear compatible, the Item.xDD4_itemVar union should document ownership by item type; this improves future matching and prevents misleading field names.
Small struct additions in common item headers may be necessary to make a source match cleanly and semantically correctly.
For simple collision callbacks, matching often consists of calling the canonical shared item/collision helpers in the correct order and returning the helper result or zero as appropriate.
Velocity reset code in item init/state transitions can require explicitly assigning x, y, and z float components to 0.0f.
naming_conventions: New item variable struct followed existing convention: itMBall_ItemVars.
New xDD4_itemVar union member used a lowercase item key: mball.
Struct field used offset-style naming, x0, because no semantic meaning was established.
Unmatched or still-unknown functions retained address-style names such as it_802978DC and it_80297944.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Used a bit test expressed as ((x0 >> 6U) & 1) to match the observed flag check before decrementing Item_804A0C64.x1C.
Zeroed item velocity components individually with 0.0f assignments.
Kept collision callbacks thin and ordered around shared helpers: setup/update via it_8026B3A8, optional it_802725D4, then bounce helper.
Introduced only the smallest visible item-var layout needed for matching, avoiding speculative fields beyond u8 x0.

review_feedback.author: r-burns
review_feedback.feedback: xDD4_itemVar is a union of item-specific structs, so instead of reusing Chicorita's struct, add a new itMBall_ItemVars struct to itCommonItems.h and put it in the xDD4_itemVars union in it/types.h.

review_feedback.author: MikeBooon
review_feedback.feedback: Author acknowledged the review and added the struct, noting they planned to continue working on the file when time allowed.

follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that continue matching src/melee/it/items/itmball.c.
Search for additional uses of xDD4_itemVar.mball to determine whether itMBall_ItemVars gains semantic field names.
Audit item files for any remaining reuse of another item's xDD4_itemVar union member where a dedicated struct should be added.
Compare itmball.c collision callback patterns with other item collision handlers using itColl_BounceOffVictim and itColl_BounceOffShield.
